datasets.name: monitoring_alerts
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  status IN ('alert', 'warn')
  AND (
    CARDINALITY(:status_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:status_filter, status)
  )
  AND (
    CARDINALITY(:metric_name_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:metric_name_filter, metric_name)
  )
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: prediction_count
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_value AS prediction_count,
  status
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name = 'prediction_count'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: data_freshness
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_value AS raw_freshness_hours,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name = 'raw_freshness_hours'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: actual_vs_predicted
queryLines:
SELECT
  p.prediction_time,
  p.feature_open_time,
  p.predicted_close,
  p.predicted_return_1h,
  p.model_target_col,
  r.open_time AS actual_open_time,
  r.close AS actual_close,
  ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) AS abs_error,
  ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) / ABS(r.close) AS pct_error
FROM
  btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions p
    LEFT JOIN btc_simply.raw.btc_hourly r
      ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
WHERE
  p.prediction_time >= :date_range.min
  AND p.prediction_time <= :date_range.max
  AND p.predicted_close > 1000.0
ORDER BY
  p.prediction_time DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: features_count
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_value AS features_count,
  status
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name = 'features_count'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: metrics_timeline
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  (
    CARDINALITY(:status_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:status_filter, status)
  )
  AND (
    CARDINALITY(:metric_name_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:metric_name_filter, metric_name)
  )
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 500

datasets.name: raw_data_count
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_value AS raw_count,
  status
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name = 'raw_count'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: latest_predictions
queryLines:
SELECT
  prediction_time,
  feature_open_time,
  predicted_close,
  predicted_return_1h,
  model_target_col,
  model_uri
FROM
  btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions
WHERE
  (
    CARDINALITY(:model_uri_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:model_uri_filter, model_uri)
  )
ORDER BY
  prediction_time DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: prediction_error_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  p.feature_open_time,
  p.predicted_close,
  r.close AS actual_close,
  ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) AS abs_error,
  ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) / ABS(r.close) AS pct_error
FROM
  btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions p
    JOIN btc_simply.raw.btc_hourly r
      ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
WHERE
  p.feature_open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND p.feature_open_time <= :date_range.max
  AND p.predicted_close > 1000.0
ORDER BY
  p.feature_open_time

datasets.name: error_stats
queryLines:
SELECT
  AVG(abs_error) AS avg_abs_error,
  AVG(pct_error) AS avg_pct_error,
  MAX(abs_error) AS max_abs_error,
  MAX(pct_error) AS max_pct_error,
  MIN(abs_error) AS min_abs_error,
  MIN(pct_error) AS min_pct_error,
  COUNT(*) AS total_predictions
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) AS abs_error,
      ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) / ABS(r.close) AS pct_error
    FROM
      btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions p
        JOIN btc_simply.raw.btc_hourly r
          ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
    WHERE
      p.feature_open_time >= :date_range.min
      AND p.feature_open_time <= :date_range.max
      AND p.predicted_close > 1000.0

datasets.name: btc_trading_volume_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('day', open_time) AS bucket_date,
  SUM(volume) AS btc_volume,
  SUM(quote_volume) AS quote_volume_usdt,
  COUNT(*) AS candle_count
FROM
  btc_simply.raw.btc_hourly
WHERE
  open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND open_time <= :date_range.max
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('day', open_time)
ORDER BY
  bucket_date

datasets.name: r_squared_metric
queryLines:
WITH predictions AS (
  SELECT
    r.close AS actual,
    p.predicted_close AS predicted
  FROM
    btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions p
      JOIN btc_simply.raw.btc_hourly r
        ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  WHERE
    p.feature_open_time >= :date_range.min
    AND p.feature_open_time <= :date_range.max
    AND p.predicted_close > 1000.0
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    AVG(actual) AS mean_actual,
    SUM(POWER(actual - predicted, 2)) AS ss_res,
    SUM(
      POWER(
        actual
          - (
            SELECT
              AVG(actual)
            FROM
              predictions
          ),
        2
      )
    ) AS ss_tot
  FROM
    predictions
)
SELECT
  1 - (ss_res / NULLIF(ss_tot, 0)) AS r_squared
FROM
  stats

datasets.name: rmse_metric
queryLines:
SELECT
  SQRT(AVG(POWER(r.close - p.predicted_close, 2))) AS rmse
FROM
  btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions p
    JOIN btc_simply.raw.btc_hourly r
      ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
WHERE
  p.feature_open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND p.feature_open_time <= :date_range.max
  AND p.predicted_close > 1000.0

datasets.name: drift_metrics_latest
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name RLIKE '^(data_drift|label_drift|prediction_drift|model_drift|concept_drift|feature_quality|schema_drift)_'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 300

datasets.name: drift_alerts_warnings
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name RLIKE '^(data_drift|label_drift|prediction_drift|model_drift|concept_drift|feature_quality|schema_drift)_'
  AND status IN ('alert', 'warn')
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: drift_performance_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name IN (
    'model_drift_rmse_168h',
    'model_drift_mae_168h',
    'model_drift_mape_168h',
    'model_drift_direction_accuracy_168h',
    'model_drift_p95_abs_error_168h',
    'concept_drift_mean_error_bias_168h'
  )
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 300

datasets.name: champion_model_status
queryLines:
SELECT
  prediction_time AS updated_at,
  model_uri AS model_name,
  'Champion' AS model_alias,
  model_version,
  model_run_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS model_algo,
  model_target_col,
  CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS rmse,
  CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS mae,
  CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS r2,
  CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS mape,
  CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS directional_accuracy,
  raw_table_version,
  features_table_version,
  model_feature_config_version AS feature_config_version,
  model_feature_config_id AS feature_config_id,
  CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS n_features
FROM
  btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions
ORDER BY
  prediction_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: champion_shap_summary
queryLines:
WITH champion AS (
  SELECT model_run_id
  FROM btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions
  ORDER BY prediction_time DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  e.created_at,
  e.model_algo,
  e.feature,
  e.mean_abs_shap,
  e.mean_shap,
  e.sample_rows,
  e.features_table_version,
  e.feature_config_id
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.model_explanations e
    INNER JOIN champion c
      ON e.run_id = c.model_run_id
WHERE
  e.explanation_type = 'shap_summary'
ORDER BY
  e.mean_abs_shap DESC
LIMIT 25

datasets.name: champion_feature_importance
queryLines:
WITH champion AS (
  SELECT model_run_id
  FROM btc_simply.predictions.btc_predictions
  ORDER BY prediction_time DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  e.created_at,
  e.model_algo,
  e.feature,
  e.importance,
  e.features_table_version,
  e.feature_config_id
FROM
  btc_simply.monitoring.model_explanations e
    INNER JOIN champion c
      ON e.run_id = c.model_run_id
WHERE
  e.explanation_type = 'feature_importance'
ORDER BY
  e.importance DESC
LIMIT 25

frame.title: Model and Concept Drift Performance Metrics
